date_range_guidance: Prioritise 2015-2026. Use older authoritative multiplier/method sources only where still standard.
priority_venues: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management

database_search_strings.Scopus/WoS: (construction OR infrastructure OR "built asset") AND (job* OR employ* OR workforce OR FTE OR "job-years") AND (capex OR "economic impact" OR "jobs per million")
database_search_strings.Google Scholar: "jobs per million" construction capex OR "job-years" "economic impact"
database_search_strings.Australia grey lit: site:gov.au construction jobs economic impact capex PDF

topic_title: Gigafactory and semiconductor fab construction and operations jobs per capex
research_goal: Find direct construction and operational employment metrics for battery gigafactories, EV plants, semiconductor fabs, and similar advanced manufacturing assets with clear capex and phase boundaries. Separate peak construction headcount, construction person-years, permanent operations jobs, capex for building versus equipment. Known leads: Nevada GOED Tesla board packet and 2018 audit; DOE BlueOval SK environmental assessment; BlueOval SK press releases; battery jobs/GWh sector reports; TSMC Arizona, Intel Ohio, Micron, Samsung Taylor — use only where scope is clear. Do not collapse indirect, supplier, and regional jobs into direct facility jobs.
role_descriptor: expert industrial construction economist and manufacturing workforce analyst
subtopic_axes: gigafactory peak construction manpower and construction person-years
semiconductor fab construction workforce per billion dollars capex
permanent operational jobs per capex for battery and chip plants
environmental assessment manpower estimates for manufacturing megaprojects
promised versus realised employment for Tesla Nevada and similar audited projects

search_batches.name: battery_gigafactories
search_batches.description: Tesla, BlueOval SK, DOE EA documents, battery jobs/GWh.

search_batches.name: semiconductor_fabs
search_batches.description: TSMC, Intel, Micron, Samsung official and EA sources.

search_batches.name: audits_realised
search_batches.description: State audits comparing projected and realised manufacturing jobs.
